message:
feat(abi): massive expansion of existing ABI modules with glibc internal aliases, C23 compat, and POSIX coverage

Expand 10 existing ABI modules and the linker version script by ~5,800
lines across multiple subsystems:

ctype_abi.rs (+69 lines):
- Add 16 glibc __is*_l / __to*_l double-underscore locale aliases
  (__isalnum_l through __toupper_l) that delegate to the existing
  public locale-aware ctype functions.

malloc_abi.rs (+74 lines):
- Add __libc_malloc, __libc_free, __libc_calloc, __libc_realloc,
  __libc_memalign, __libc_pvalloc, __libc_valloc, __libc_mallopt,
  __libc_mallinfo internal aliases used by glibc internals.
- Add __libc_freeres (release internal resources, no-op),
  __libc_init_first (early init, no-op), __libc_sa_len (sockaddr
  length by AF family), __libc_allocate_rtsig (RT signal stub).

pthread_abi.rs (+648 lines, net):
- Replace minimal 20-byte PthreadAttrData with full 48-byte layout
  covering guard_size, stack_addr, inherit_sched, sched_policy,
  sched_priority, and flags bitmap.
- Add ExtendedAttrData registry (HashMap keyed by attr address) for
  CPU affinity masks and signal masks that exceed the inline overlay.
- Add DEFAULT_THREAD_ATTR static with PthreadAttrDefaults struct for
  pthread_getattr_default_np / pthread_setattr_default_np support.
- Implement full POSIX thread attribute API: pthread_attr_getguardsize,
  pthread_attr_setguardsize, pthread_attr_getstack,
  pthread_attr_setstack, pthread_attr_getstackaddr,
  pthread_attr_setstackaddr, pthread_attr_getschedpolicy,
  pthread_attr_setschedpolicy, pthread_attr_getschedparam,
  pthread_attr_setschedparam, pthread_attr_getinheritsched,
  pthread_attr_setinheritsched, pthread_attr_getscope,
  pthread_attr_setscope, pthread_attr_getaffinity_np,
  pthread_attr_setaffinity_np, pthread_attr_setsigmask_np,
  pthread_attr_getsigmask_np.

pwd_abi.rs (+113 lines):
- Add complete gshadow database API (setsgent, endsgent, getsgent,
  getsgent_r, getsgnam, getsgnam_r, fgetsgent, fgetsgent_r,
  sgetsgent, sgetsgent_r, putsgent) returning safe "not found" stubs.
- Add lckpwdf / ulckpwdf password file locking (no-op stubs).

stdio_abi.rs (+198 lines):
- Add C23 __isoc23_scanf family (scanf, fscanf, sscanf, vscanf,
  vfscanf, vsscanf) and __isoc99_wscanf alias.
- Add glibc _IO_* internal libio symbols: _IO_putc, _IO_getc,
  _IO_puts, _IO_feof, _IO_ferror, _IO_flockfile, _IO_funlockfile,
  _IO_ftrylockfile, _IO_peekc_locked, _IO_padn, _IO_sgetn,
  _IO_seekoff, _IO_seekpos.
- Export _IO_2_1_stdin_, _IO_2_1_stdout_, _IO_2_1_stderr_ as static
  sentinel addresses for binary compatibility.

stdlib_abi.rs (+708 lines):
- Add C23 __isoc23_strto* aliases (strtol, strtoul, strtoll, strtoull,
  strtoimax, strtoumax) plus locale _l variants.
- Add __assert_fail, __assert_perror_fail, __assert for assert.h macro
  failure handlers with formatted error messages and process::abort().
- Add __cxa_at_quick_exit for C++ runtime at_quick_exit registration.
- Add reentrant random48 family (_r variants): drand48_r, erand48_r,
  lrand48_r, nrand48_r, mrand48_r, jrand48_r, srand48_r, seed48_r,
  lcong48_r with full drand48_data struct state management.
- Add reentrant System V random: random_r, srandom_r, initstate_r,
  setstate_r using simple LCG implementation.
- Add ecvt_r, fcvt_r, qecvt, qfcvt, qgcvt, qecvt_r, qfcvt_r for
  floating-point-to-string conversion (quad-precision uses f64 approx).
- Add imaxabs, imaxdiv, strtoq, strtouq (BSD aliases), glob_pattern_p,
  twalk_r, ualarm via setitimer(ITIMER_REAL).

string_abi.rs (+606 lines):
- Add GNU old regex API: re_set_syntax, re_compile_pattern,
  re_compile_fastmap, re_search, re_search_2, re_match, re_match_2,
  re_set_registers using frankenlibc-core regex engine.
- Add glibc __str*/__stp*/__mem* internal aliases: __stpcpy, __stpncpy,
  __strcasecmp, __strcasestr, __strdup, __strndup, __strtok_r,
  __strerror_r, __strverscmp, __rawmemchr, __mempcpy, __memcmpeq.
- Add locale aliases: strcasecmp_l, strncasecmp_l, __strcasecmp_l,
  __strncasecmp_l, __strcoll_l, __strxfrm_l.
- Add GCC constant-optimized variants: __strsep_g, __strsep_1c/2c/3c,
  __strpbrk_c2/c3, __strcspn_c1/c2/c3, __strspn_c1/c2/c3,
  __strtok_r_1c, __strcpy_small, __stpcpy_small.
- Add __strto*_internal (with group flag), __strto*_l locale variants,
  __strftime_l, __strfmon_l.

unistd_abi.rs (+1137 lines):
- Add semtimedop via SYS_semtimedop syscall.
- Add sched_getcpu (SYS_getcpu), getcpu, __sched_cpucount (popcount),
  __sched_cpualloc/cpufree for CPU set management.
- Add mount_setattr (SYS_mount_setattr = 442), signalfd4 (SYS = 289).
- Add utmp/utmpx accounting database: getutent_r, getutid, getutid_r,
  getutline, getutline_r, pututline, updwtmp, updwtmpx, getutmp,
  getutmpx as safe stubs.
- Add massive __* glibc internal alias set: __read, __write, __open,
  __close, __waitpid, __poll, __select, __send, __connect, __fcntl,
  __lseek, __sbrk, __getpid, __getpgid, __setpgid, __sysconf,
  __getpagesize, __gettimeofday, __gmtime_r, __nanosleep,
  __secure_getenv, __posix_getopt, __bzero, __ffs.
- Add __sched_* aliases: __sched_yield, __sched_get_priority_max/min,
  __sched_getparam, __sched_getscheduler, __sched_setscheduler,
  __sched_setparam, __sched_rr_get_interval.
- Add __sig* aliases: __sigaction, __sigaddset, __sigdelset,
  __sigismember, __sigpause, __sigsuspend.

wchar_abi.rs (+471 lines):
- Add WctransT type alias for wide character transformation descriptor.
- Add C23 __isoc23_* wide aliases: wscanf, fwscanf, swscanf, vwscanf,
  vfwscanf, vswscanf, wcstol, wcstoul, wcstoll, wcstoull, wcstoimax,
  wcstoumax, plus _l locale variants.
- Add isw*_l / tow*_l POSIX wide ctype locale variants (iswalnum_l
  through iswxdigit_l, towlower_l, towupper_l, towctrans_l).
- Add __isw*_l double-underscore locale aliases.
- Add __wcs* locale/internal aliases: __wcscasecmp_l, __wcsncasecmp_l,
  __wcscoll_l, __wcsxfrm_l, __wcstol_l, __wcstoul_l, __wcstoll_l,
  __wcstoull_l, __wcstod_l, __wcstof_l, __wcstold_l.
- Add __wcsto*_internal (with group flag) and __wcsftime_l.

runtime_policy.rs:
- Fix flaky kernel snapshot test: replace panic! with assert! and add
  a final snapshot attempt to reduce false negatives on slow machines.

version_scripts/libc.map (+1317 lines):
- Register all new symbols in the GLIBC_2.2.5 version node including
  C23 stdbit.h (70 symbols), fortify __*_chk family, glibc internal
  __* aliases, _IO_* libio symbols, RPC/XDR/SVC functions, isoc23/99
  aliases, pthread attribute extensions, and all other new exports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
